en.value:
Activity # 2.1 Support HSCB to roll-out M & E system in selected district and monitoring the coverage under comprehensive package of services by developing capacities of Government and CSOs.

	Activity # 2.2 Technical assistance to review/revise 2006 National M&E Guideline and build country's capacities in collating and analysing data and packaging it into strategic information-at the district& national levels.

	Activity # 2.3 Support in develolpment process and writing of UNGASS Report including NASA (including printing, launching, dessimination and documentation of its utilization) 

	Activity # 2.4 Support in the 2010 projection and estimation of HIV infection and size estimation of MARP and vulnerable groups like CABA

	Activity # 2.5 Support in the development and implementation of a National Research Agenda (including studies on stigma index, changing patterns of sex work / drug use, impact and vulnerabilities to HIV infection of migrant workers from the Far and Mid-West) conducted and findings disseminated and used.

	Activity # 2.6. Support to strengthen human resources of country' s M & E system and coordination to enhance harmonization of evidence-based response.

donor_extensions.donor: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS

financing.donor: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS

implementing_agency: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS

en.full: Strategic information strengthened and available to support knowing your epidemic, guiding an evidence informed response and improving accountability.

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
